description: Returns a paginated list of users referred by a given user.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user whose referrals to retrieve.

limit.description: Maximum number of referral entries to return.

output.description: Paginated referral list. Response shape varies; check items, referrals, data, or users key.

fields.items: array — referral entries (present in some versions)
fields.nextCursor: string|null — cursor for the next page

notes: Requires jwt cookie authentication (not api_key). Response shape may vary by server version — check items, referrals, data, or users key for the entry list.
